concerns.text: Phase 5.5 (Tasks T033-T038) implements 'Failure Topology Analysis' (classifying rigidity, confabulation, etc.) which has NO corresponding Functional Requirement (FR) or Success Criterion (SC) in spec.md. The spec only mandates binary pass/fail (FR-003) and statistical analysis of correctness/quality (FR-005). This is unapproved scope creep; the spec must be updated to include these requirements before tasks can exist.

Task T038 instructs the implementer to 'Update spec.md requirements (FR-003)'. This is a workflow violation: tasks cannot retroactively authorize changes to the spec. The spec must be updated in the 'specified' stage first, then tasks generated. This task creates a circular dependency.

Task T036 requires computing 'frequency distributions of failure types'. This metric is not authorized by FR-005 (which mandates Chi-square/ANOVA) or any other FR. There is no spec element covering the statistical analysis of failure topology categories.

Task T020 description contains the placeholder text 'endpoint `No address associated with hostname`'. This is a stale artifact from a template or error state that must be replaced with the actual HuggingFace Inference API URL before implementation to prevent immediate failure.
